StatDef.label: Magic Power
StatDef.description: The raw force of a pawn's mana. Higher magic power strengthens spells and magical effects, allowing mana to strike, heal, or manifest with greater intensity.

StatDef.label: Magic Resistance
StatDef.description: A pawn's ability to withstand hostile mana. Higher magic resistance reduces the impact of magical damage and harmful magical effects.

StatDef.label: Mana Control
StatDef.description: A pawn's ability to guide and stabilize mana. Higher mana control improves spell precision, efficiency, stability, and the handling of complex magical effects.

StatDef.label: Wind Affinity
StatDef.description: A natural or awakened bond with wind-aspected mana, which can be aquired through bloodline, spirit contracts, rituals, or fate. \n\nHigher affinity makes wind magic easier to command, more efficient to wield, and less harmful to endure.

StatDef.label: Fire Affinity
StatDef.description: A natural or awakened bond with fire-aspected mana, which can be aquired through bloodline, spirit contracts, rituals, or fate. \n\nHigher affinity makes fire magic easier to command, more efficient to wield, and less harmful to endure.

StatDef.label: Water Affinity
StatDef.description: A natural or awakened bond with water-aspected mana, which can be aquired through bloodline, spirit contracts, rituals, or fate. \n\nHigher affinity makes water magic easier to command, more efficient to wield, and less harmful to endure.

StatDef.label: Earth Affinity
StatDef.description: A natural or awakened bond with earth-aspected mana, which can be aquired through bloodline, spirit contracts, rituals, or fate. \n\nHigher affinity makes earth magic easier to command, more efficient to wield, and less harmful to endure.

StatDef.label: Holy Affinity
StatDef.description: A natural or awakened bond with holy-aspected mana, which can be aquired through bloodline, spirit contracts, rituals, or fate. \n\nHigher affinity makes holy magic easier to command, more efficient to wield, and less harmful to endure.

StatDef.label: Dark Affinity
StatDef.description: A natural or awakened bond with dark-aspected mana, which can be aquired through bloodline, spirit contracts, rituals, or fate. \n\nHigher affinity makes dark magic easier to command, more efficient to wield, and less harmful to endure.
